title: trifolium alpestre subsp. lanigerum
intro: Trifolium alpestre subsp. lanigerum, also known as woolly alpine clover, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium alpestre subsp. lanigerum include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to support the immune system. This plant can be prepared in herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
